## Testing checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (no type errors)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (no lint warnings)
- [ ] `cd agent && go test ./...` passes (if agent code changed)
- [ ] New or changed behaviour has test coverage
- [ ] Coverage did not drop below 80%
